parameters.name: wavetype
parameters.label: Type
parameters.description: The shape of one cycle of the pattern.

parameters.name: length
parameters.label: Length
parameters.description: Set the number of samples for this .

parameters.name: numcycles
parameters.label: Number of Cycles
parameters.description: Set the number of repeating cycles of the Type shapes over the Length, except for Random.

parameters.name: bias
parameters.label: Bias
parameters.description: Makes Triangle type into a sawtooth wave, and sets the Square type variable-width.

parameters.name: seed
parameters.label: Seed
parameters.description: The seed for the random Types.

parameters.name: phase
parameters.label: Phase
parameters.description: Shifts the cycle.

parameters.name: phasestep
parameters.label: Phase Step per Channel
parameters.description: Increases the phase for each channel. A Phase Step of .25 when there are 2 channels will shift the second channel to be 1/4 cycle later phase than the first phase, where if the 2 channels are used for

parameters.name: taperdecay
parameters.label: Taper Decay Rate
parameters.description: An exponent that is applied to the result of the taper.

parameters.name: amp
parameters.label: Amplitude
parameters.description: See also the Range.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.label: Offset
parameters.description: See also the Range.

parameters.name: integer
parameters.label: Integer
parameters.description: A round-off menu to convert all numbers to integers.

parameters.name: reverse
parameters.label: Reverse
parameters.description: Reverses the final order of the samples as in the .

parameters.name: randomize
parameters.label: Randomize
parameters.description: When the Type parameter above is set to Random Non-Repeating Integers, this trigger will randomize all the values.

parameters.name: channelname
parameters.label: Channel Names
parameters.description: You can creates many channels with simple patterns like , which generates 20 channels from to , or which generates , and . See the section, Common Parameters for a description of this and all Options.

parameters.name: combine
parameters.label: Combine Channels
parameters.description: If an input is attached, it adopts the length and sample rate of the input , and

parameters.name: rate
parameters.label: Sample Rate
parameters.description: The sample rate of the channels, in samples per second.

parameters.name: left
parameters.label: Extend Left
parameters.description: The left right extend conditions (before/after range).

parameters.name: right
parameters.label: Extend Right
parameters.description: The right extend conditions (before/after range).

parameters.name: defval
parameters.label: Default Value
parameters.description: The value used for the Default Value extend condition.

parameters.name: timeslice
parameters.label: Time Slice
parameters.description: Turning this on forces the channels to be " ".  A is the time between the last cook frame and the current cook frame.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.label: Scope
parameters.description: To determine which channels get affected, some CHOPs use a string on the Common page.

parameters.name: srselect
parameters.label: Sample Rate Match
parameters.description: Handle cases where multiple input CHOPs' sample rates are different. When Resampling occurs, the curves are interpolated according to the Interpolation Method Option, or "Linear" if the Interpolate Op

parameters.name: exportmethod
parameters.label: Export Method
parameters.description: This will determine how to connect the channel to the parameter. Refer to the article for more information.

parameters.name: autoexportroot
parameters.label: Export Root
parameters.description: This path points to the root node where all of the paths that exporting by are relative to.

parameters.name: exporttable
parameters.label: Export Table
parameters.description: The used to hold the export information when using the Table Methods (See above).

parameters.name: taper2
parameters.label: Taper2
parameters.description: Two parameters to multiply by a line from taper1 at the start to taper2 at the end. The default of (1 1) has no effect.

parameters.name: torange2
parameters.label: Torange2
parameters.description: A value at each From Range will become its corresponding To Range value.

parameters.name: fromrange2
parameters.label: Fromrange2
parameters.description: A value at each From Range will become its corresponding To Range value.

examples.label: Create a sine wave LFO
examples.description: Generate a sine wave with a 2-second period.

examples.label: Adjust square wave duty cycle
examples.description: Set a 25% duty cycle for a short pulse pattern.
